Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-14380 affecting package perl-DBI for versions less than 1.650-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-14380 affecting package perl-DBI for versions less than 1.650-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package perl-DBI is earlier than 1.650-1, affected by CVE-2026-14380
